ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage record (0: 2011, 1: 2012) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1 to 12) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the day is a working day (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: mist, 3: light snow/rain, 4: heavy rain/snow) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Normalized humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "windspeed_ms" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals on the day */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bikes were rented */,
  "peak_hour" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented during peak hour */,
  "off_peak_hour" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented during off-peak hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_weathersit FOREIGN KEY ("weathersit") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage record associated with the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., rental, return) */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike rented (e.g., road bike, mountain bike) */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken by the user (e.g., route ID or distance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES bike_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan chosen by the user (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_plan FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_plan") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_plan")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the subscription plan (in months or years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_invetory" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., road bike, mountain bike) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the bike (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_invetory_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
